input:
He felt that there was an excellent chance of defeating the Muslims. After all, the Muslims’ morale, he imagined, was very low after their defeat at Uḥud and the massacres of their companions at al-Rajīʿ and B’ir Maʿūnah. He therefore sent a message to the Prophet: “We are not prepared to evacuate our homes. We will resist any attempt to evacuate us. You can do as you please.” When the Prophet received this message he and his followers glorified God and said: “The Jews have decided to fight.” The Muslims mobilized and the Prophet marched at the head of a considerable force, with ʿAlī carrying the flag.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 22: Vulnerability and Treachery

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 22: Vulnerability and Treachery

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Mid-50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a green cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by green cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Safiyyan (not specified)
characters.appearance: Adult, rough-hewn features, likely wearing simple white thobe and possibly a headscarf. Face obscured by shadow or lit from behind, body shown in silhouette.

characters.name: Ali ibn Abi Talib
characters.appearance: Early 20s, light olive skin, athletic build, strong facial features. Thick black beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Confident demeanor, determined eyes.

output.moral_lesson: Courage and faith are stronger than any adversity. Allah will always help His believers when they stand up for what is right.
output.narrative_text: The Prophet received a message from the Jews saying they would not leave their homes. They were prepared to fight. The Muslims mobilized and the Prophet marched at the head of a large force, with Ali carrying the flag.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, backlit by sunlight. Ali and the crowd shown in silhouette or from behind, no graphic violence. Suitable for children.

output.image_prompt: Gouache painting. Exterior of a 7th century Makkah mud-brick home. A man in white thobe and green cloak, white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing in the doorway with warm golden sunlight streaming behind him. In the background, a group of adult Arab men, shown in silhouette or from behind, with faces obscured by shadow or lit from behind. In the foreground, a young man with light olive skin, athletic build, holding a simple wooden flagpole with a white flag. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
